## Checklist

- [ ] Both test suites pass locally (`npm test` and `pytest`)
- [ ] Conventional commit subject (`fix:`, `feat:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] No new dependency added without justification
- [ ] No reference to internal infrastructure, methodology, or private code
